description: Local web control panel: live instance roster, terminal-faithful ANSI session mirror (hand-rolled renderer, no deps), and direct keyboard passthrough (single terminal input path) for pi and claude sessions; agent roster with spawn-from-browser (default: no task, awaiting instructions); Jira epic/roster panel when oas.jira is active; guarded file (/api/file) and git-diff (/api/diff) endpoints for the desktop viewers.

requires.why: session capture and keystroke injection for the live panel
